Injury Caused by Fall/Accident Reason for hospitalization: injury caused by fall or accident at home. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0895_HOSP_STROKE (M0895) Myocardial Infarction/Stroke Reason for hospitalization: myocardial infarction, stroke. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0895_HOSP_OTHER (M0895) Other Than Above Reason for Hospitalization Reason for hospitalization: Other than above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
